meaning: n.[生化]甲状腺素,甲状腺氨酸
examples: Conclusion the patients should be managed by maintenance of thyroxine therapy.
The treatment included meticulous chest care and oral L-thyroxine replacement therapy.
The fluctuations of thyroid follicles and secretion of thyroxine are in keeping with that of T4.
This means the "under-active" thyroid gland in her neck does not produce enough of the thyroxine hormone.
